final_prompt.prompt:
Create a brand identity system showcase for the "染秋 (RAN QIU)" autumn fragrance brand.

Style/medium: needs an "东方美学" (Eastern aesthetics) direction — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include three distinct sections: primary color, secondary colors, and typography specifications
Subject: must include the brand name "染秋" and "RAN QIU" as the focal identity
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, contemplative autumn atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: must be autumn-inspired, warm and poetic — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: needs a refined, artisanal surface treatment — exact material finish is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "染秋", "RAN QIU"
Constraints: must preserve the brand's Eastern philosophy and autumn poetic essence, three-panel layout for color + typography system
Avoid: must avoid cliche autumn imagery (pumpkins, generic fall leaves), must avoid Western-centric fragrance tropes
